[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010000001 2
1 1111000001 5
2 0010100111 5
3 0001100001 3
4 0110011001 5
5 0010110111 6
6 1111001101 7
7 0110101111 7

01 10 0111111001 7
12 21 0110111111 8
23 32 1111111111 a
34 43 1111101111 9
45 54 0111101111 8
56 65 1111101001 7
67 76 1111110111 9
70 07 0011110111 7

02 20 0011110111 7
13 31 1111011101 8
24 42 0110111111 8
35 53 1111001101 7 match 6
46 64 1111101111 9
57 75 0011111111 8
60 06 1111100001 6
71 17 0111111111 9

03 30 1111101101 8
14 41 0110111111 8
25 52 0011111111 8
36 63 1111101101 8
47 74 0111111111 9
50 05 0011101001 5
61 16 1111111001 8
72 27 0011110111 7

04 40 0111101111 8
15 51 0111011001 6
26 62 1111110111 9
37 73 1111111111 a
